title: hoheria sexstylosa
intro: Hoheria sexstylosa, also known as the white flowered lacebark tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. The medicinal properties of Hoheria sexstylosa include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide protection against oxidative stress. Hoheria sexstylosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in various forms.
